Wren Fenwhistle is the founder of Tidecraft Systems. Wren wants a technical co-founder intro before committing.

---
title: Mateo Glimmerton
type: person

summary: Founder of Kelpforge.
---

Mateo Glimmerton is the founder of Kelpforge. Mateo shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

---
title: Tidecraft Systems

Tidecraft Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Wren Fenwhistle. The seed conversation started in 2025.

title: Larchgate Ventures

Larchgate Ventures is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Wren Fenwhistle and Mateo Glimmerton both want Larchgate Ventures in the Tidecraft Systems round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
